overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character exiting an elevator into a neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character walks through rain-slicked streets beneath elevated highways, passes a deceased civilian, and navigates intersections in a dense cyberpunk city environment with holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture.

events.description: elevator doors open revealing the exterior urban environment

agents.ego_description: standing in elevator facing the doors as they open to the outside

entered.detail: metallic walls with illuminated advertisement panels
illuminated sign for El Guapo product above the elevator doors
multiple glowing yellow screens showing beverage advertisements
vertical panel with floor buttons and directional indicators
dark metal mesh wall on the left side of the elevator car

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit elevator car with metallic walls and glowing digital advertisements. The camera faces the elevator doors as they slide open, revealing a neon-lit urban environment outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza beneath elevated highway

events.description: steps out of elevator into covered outdoor walkway
passes a deceased civilian lying on the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered plaza, passing a body on the ground while approaching a large holographic advertisement

notable_agents.action: lying deceased on the pavement in light-colored clothing

entered.detail: large vertical holographic billboard displaying a masked figure with text SECURE YOUR FUTURE
massive concrete ceiling and support columns of the elevated highway above
rain-slicked dark pavement reflecting neon lights
rectangular concrete planter with low shrubs
row of illuminated vending machines against the right wall

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator, the character enters a covered urban plaza beneath an elevated highway. The wet asphalt reflects the glow of a large holographic advertisement pillar ahead. The character passes a deceased civilian lying on the ground to the right, continuing toward the open street beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional walkway under overpass approaching intersection

events.description: slight turn to the right while navigating around the plaza center
emerging from deep shadow of overpass into area with more ambient neon light

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass structure, approaching an intersection with increasing pedestrian activity visible ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead in the distance toward the intersection

entered.detail: small wooden food stall with green stools and illuminated menu
opening in the urban landscape where streets meet under the overpass
tall pole with traffic signals and attached neon signage

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the massive concrete overpass, the character walks past a food kiosk on the right and approaches a brighter intersection. The environment transitions from the enclosed plaza to a more open street crossing, with scattered pedestrians visible ahead and neon signs illuminating the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit intersection with crosswalks and commercial storefronts

events.description: enters open intersection with visible sky and crossing pedestrians
crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles pass on the right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk, navigating around other pedestrians while observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in the same direction on the crosswalk

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and WALK marking
large vertical red holographic billboard with text 3 MOUTHS 1 DESIRE
illuminated storefront sign for Brooklyn Barista coffee shop
stairs leading down to underground transit with glowing signage

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a wide-open intersection filled with vibrant neon signage. Crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk, the character passes other pedestrians while a large red holographic advertisement dominates the left side. The Brooklyn Barista shop glows on the right as the character continues down the rain-reflective street toward the metro entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the confines of a dim elevator into the expansive, neon-drenched streets of a rainy cyberpunk city. It begins inside a metallic elevator car with glowing digital ads, moving forward as the doors slide open to reveal a covered urban plaza. As the camera exits the lift, it glides across wet asphalt beneath a massive concrete overpass, passing a deceased civilian and a food kiosk while the lighting shifts from enclosed shadows to the reflected glow of holographic pillars. The scene then opens further as the character leaves the shelter of the highway, transitioning into a wide, vibrant intersection filled with pedestrians and yellow-striped crosswalks. Finally, the view expands to encompass a towering red hologram and the glowing facade of the Brooklyn Barista shop while moving toward a distant metro entrance.
